provenance.notes: Character category names and some hue-range notes are imported from community-curated sources. These are not official protocol traits and no MoonCat IDs are included.

classification.description: Character cats are community-recognized MoonCats that resemble cats or characters from popular media. Rate My Mooncat says these charts document community narratives and are subjective rather than official traits.

garfield.label: Garfield
garfield.notes: Rate My Mooncat change history lists the current all-range as 20-45. Premium range exists on the site but is not yet extracted into this file.

cheshire.label: Cheshire Cat
cheshire.notes: Rate My Mooncat change history lists current all and premium ranges.

pinkPanther.label: Pink Panther
pinkPanther.notes: Rate My Mooncat says OpenSea cannot filter hue ranges crossing zero and records Pink Panther all-range as 325-10. Premium range was introduced as 335-355 and later extended by adding 356-359.

alien.label: Alien
alien.notes: Rate My Mooncat lists Alien all and premium categories, but this pass did not extract hue ranges.

zombie.label: Zombie
zombie.notes: Rate My Mooncat change history lists current all and premium ranges.

simba.label: Simba
simba.notes: Rate My Mooncat lists Simba as a character category added in 2022, but this pass did not extract hue ranges.

golden.label: Golden Lucky Cat
golden.notes: Rate My Mooncat change history lists Golden Lucky Cat all-range as 46-58.

pikachu.label: Pikachu
pikachu.notes: Rate My Mooncat lists Pikachu as a character category added in 2023, but this pass did not extract hue ranges.

todos: Extract missing hue ranges from stable chart/filter sources where possible.
Decide whether and how to materialize MoonCat IDs from hue/category rules.
Keep all character-cat membership clearly marked as community-curated, not official traits.
